decisions: We agreed to split the backend pipeline into two separate services.
We also decided to freeze any new feature requests until the current sprint closes.
action_items: Reda: refactor the data ingestion module by May 9th
Marwa: update API documentation by May 10th
Maryem: prepare the sprint review presentation by May 8th
Imane: run integration tests and share report by May 9th
